header.title: My account
header.description: Your profile, security and personal connections.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: The photo and name your team sees.

email.title: Email
email.pendingNotice: Waiting for {{email}} to be confirmed. Check the new email's inbox.
email.confirmationHint: We'll send a link to the new email. The change only happens after confirmation.

security.title: Change password
security.description: Use a strong password with at least 8 characters.

calendar.description: Your meetings are created on your Google Calendar, with a Meet link and invites for every attendee.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect Google Calendar?
disconnectConfirm.description: New meetings will stop being created on your calendar until you reconnect.

connector.title: Claude connector
connector.description: Your personal URL — it works across all of your workspaces. Add it in Claude under Settings → Connectors → Add custom connector. The URL already carries your credential — no login or OAuth needed.
connector.lockedTitle: Requires a workspace with an active subscription
connector.lockedDescription: The connector unlocks once you have at least one workspace on the Agência or Enterprise plan with an active subscription. Subscribe to run your workspaces from Claude.
connector.secretHint: The URL is a secret: anyone who has it can operate your workspaces with your permissions.

rotateConfirm.title: Generate a new URL?
rotateConfirm.description: The current URL will stop working in Claude. You'll need to reconnect the connector with the new URL.

apps.title: Authorized apps
apps.description: Applications with OAuth access to your account.

revokeConfirm.title: Revoke access for {{name}}?
revokeConfirm.description: The app loses access to your account immediately.

toasts.emailChangeSent: We've sent a confirmation link to the new email.

workspace.createDescription: Create a new agency. You'll be the owner and switch into it automatically.

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for the interface, emails, and notifications.
language.label: Language
